title: Senior Financial Analyst - Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity
company: Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
